summary: Explosive first‑set closer “Might As Well” shines; recording source and quality are not documented.
review: Reviewers rave about the high‑energy performance of “Might As Well,” noting it as a perfect, dynamite‑like set closer. No comments were made regarding the audio source or fidelity, leaving the recording quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical praise for a standout song gives a high show rating, but lack of any recording‑quality feedback limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The track is highlighted as the first‑set closer, described with explosive, high‑octane energy that caps the set strongly.
